task_completion.description: Open the Flight Crew View application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Crew View application is launched and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Friends or Requests section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI shows a section dedicated to managing friends, connections, or requests.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Sent Requests tab or list
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific 'Sent Requests' tab, filter, or list is actively selected and displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate the pending request for the target email
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email address 'ghost_pilot@example.com' is clearly visible as a pending item within the Sent Requests list.

task_completion.description: Initiate the cancellation of the friend request
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Cancel', 'Withdraw', 'Revoke', or 'X' button specifically associated with the 'ghost_pilot@example.com' entry, or a confirmation dialog for this cancellation is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the request has been successfully cancelled
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email 'ghost_pilot@example.com' is no longer present in the Sent Requests list, or a success message/toast indicating the request was cancelled is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to cancel the request
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI navigation and touch interactions, without the use of terminal windows, ADB commands, or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View application
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements, headers, and styling match a genuine Android application (Flight Crew View), rather than a text editor, notes app, or a mocked web page.

integrity.description: Agent did not spoof the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: The absence of the target email in the final screenshot is a result of UI interaction, not just the agent typing 'cancelled' in a text field or navigating to an empty unrelated list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target email for the friend request cancellation is exactly 'ghost_pilot@example.com'. The agent must perform this action specifically within the 'Sent Requests' UI context of the Flight Crew View application.
